configurations.name: xampp-proxy
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http');const srv=http.createServer((req,res)=>{if(req.url==='/'){res.writeHead(302,{Location:'/Ansar/'});return res.end();}const opts={hostname:'localhost',port:80,path:req.url,method:req.method,headers:{...req.headers,host:'localhost'}};const r=http.request(opts,pr=>{res.writeHead(pr.statusCode,pr.headers);pr.pipe(res);});req.pipe(r);r.on('error',e=>{res.writeHead(502);res.end('Upstream: '+e.message);});});srv.listen(8787,()=>console.log('Proxy :8787 → localhost:80, / redirects to /Ansar/'));
